svg.title: Bag Cradle Tray — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Material: PETG | Quantity: 2 | Scale noted per view | Dimensions in mm
1. All interior floor-to-wall junctions: 3.0mm fillet radius
2. Sidewall draft angle: 3 deg outward (not shown in orthographic views)
3. Spout notch edge: 1.0mm chamfer on top edge
4. Print: PETG, 0.2mm layers, 15-20% infill, 3 walls, no supports
5. Floor profile: circular arc, 4mm sagitta over 200mm interior width
6. Two barb detents per tab at Y=90-110 and Y=270-290 (20mm each)
7. Cap end (+Y) is open -- no end wall
